content:
💡 CatVTON | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: Virtual clothing try-on for fashion
✨ Key Features: • Lightweight Network (899.06M parameters) • Parameter-Efficient Training (49.57M parameters trainable) • Simplified Inference (< 8G VRAM for 1024x768) • Diffusion Model for Virtual Try-On • Mask-free version available
📖 Summary: CatVTON is an efficient diffusion model for virtual clothing try-on. It features a lightweight network architecture, parameter-efficient training, and simplified inference, allowing high-resolution try-ons with minimal VRAM.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
